knowledge_base.library: The central library is open from 8:00 AM to 10:00 PM. It is located near the Science Block.
knowledge_base.canteen: The main canteen is located behind the auditorium. Timing: 9:00 AM - 8:00 PM.
knowledge_base.lab: Computer and Science labs are located in Block B and C respectively. Access requires a valid ID.
knowledge_base.office: The administration office is in the Main Building, Ground Floor.
knowledge_base.hostel: Boys and Girls hostels are on the east and west wings of the campus.
knowledge_base.parking: Parking is available near the main gate and behind the sports complex.
knowledge_base.wifi: Campus-wide high-speed WiFi is available. Sign in with your student credentials.
knowledge_base.medical: The health center is open 24/7 for emergencies, located near the girl's hostel.
knowledge_base.events: Check the notice board in the main hall for upcoming hackathons and cultural fests!

Library.info: Welcome to the Central Library! Silence is appreciated. You can find study cabins on the 2nd floor.

Lab.info: Welcome to the Advanced AI Lab. Please log in to your workstation to begin.

Canteen.info: Welcome to the Canteen. Lunch special today: Vegetable Biryani.

default_response: I'm sorry, I don't have information on that. Try searching for 'library', 'canteen', 'lab', or 'wifi'.
